prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.add.title: Add prompts
prompts.add.description: Connect a MCP server to load prompts automatically, or build a reusable template with named arguments.
prompts.group.local.name: Local prompts
prompts.add.subtitle: Build a reusable template with named arguments.
prompts.add.field.name: Name
prompts.add.placeholder.template: Hello '{{' name '}}', welcome to '{{' company '}}'! How can I help you with '{{' topic '}}' today?
prompts.add.placeholder.arguments: Example: an array of objects with name, description, and required fields
prompts.add.error: Failed to add prompt. Please try again.
prompts.add.error.argumentsArrayRequired: Arguments must be a JSON array
